reports.title: Generated Weekly Marketing Report
reports.content:
# Generated Weekly Marketing Report

## Executive Summary
This week showed healthy marketing activity with steady lead volume and active reputation monitoring.

## Key Metrics
- New leads: 14
- Website sessions: 1,842
- Avg. lead response time: 23 minutes
- Pending approvals: 2

## Recommended Actions
1. Clear pending approvals.
2. Prioritize fast lead response.
3. Keep content pipeline moving.

reports.title: Weekly Marketing Report — Week of March 3, 2026
reports.content:
# Weekly Marketing Report

## Executive Summary
A strong week across paid and organic channels. Website traffic was up 12% week over week, lead volume matched forecast, and average lead response time remained under the 30-minute target.

## Key Metrics
- Website sessions: 1,842
- New leads: 14
- Google rating: 4.7★
- Average lead response time: 23 minutes

## Recommended Actions
1. Publish the response for the 1-star review.
2. Refresh Meta creative.
3. Publish the fiberglass vs. concrete blog post.

activity.message: Generate this week's weekly marketing report
